description_en: This is a tangible cultural property, a stone wall at Nakakōji belonging to the Shibata family. It is a town-designated cultural property of Kanra.

description_en: This is a tangible cultural property, a flat stone stele of Hōshō-ji temple dating to Bun'ei 5 (1268). It is a town-designated cultural property of Kanra.
